results.evidence: SkillFileBrowser rendered in EditorPanel.tsx:377-384 when plugin && skill truthy. Collapsed by default (useState(false) in SkillFileBrowser.tsx:163). Shows activeFile path in collapsed strip (line 193).

Click on collapsed strip toggles expanded state (SkillFileBrowser.tsx:178). Expanded tree renders hierarchical nodes via buildTree() (line 15) with FolderIcon/FileIcon per type. Folder chevrons toggle child visibility.
SecondaryFileViewer.tsx:25-29 getFileType() detects .md files. Split mode (default) renders RawPane (readonly textarea) on left and PreviewPane with renderMarkdown() on right (lines 87-101, 243-251).
SecondaryFileViewer.tsx:25 getFileType() detects .json. PreviewPane renders formatJson() (JSON.stringify parsed, null, 2) in <pre> block (lines 64-84). RawPane shows raw text (lines 245-246).
SecondaryFileViewer.tsx:29 returns 'other' for non-md/json. Content area falls through to RawPane only (line 254-255). No preview pane rendered for 'other' type.

useSkillFiles.ts:43 selectFile('SKILL.md') clears secondaryContent and error. EditorPanel.tsx:301 hides toolbar buttons when !isSkillMd; line 397 wraps editor body in {isSkillMd && ...}; line 634 guards AiEditBar; line 639 guards RegenPanel; line 763 guards ImprovePanel.
useSkillFiles.ts:34-38 useEffect([plugin, skill]) resets activeFile to 'SKILL.md', clears secondaryContent and error, re-fetches file list.

useSkillFiles.ts:53-55 catch block sets error state. SecondaryFileViewer.tsx:146-163 renders 'Unable to open file' card with error message. Backend api-routes.ts:338 returns 500 with error message for read failures.
api-routes.ts:328-331 checks size > 1MB and returns 413 with 'File too large' error. Fixed during grill (was returning 200 with binary:true).
api-routes.ts:350-352 sets truncated flag when buf.length > 500KB. SecondaryFileViewer.tsx:184-196 renders amber warning banner showing truncation info with formatBytes().
api-routes.ts:342-348 scans first 8KB for null bytes and returns { binary: true, size } with no content. SecondaryFileViewer.tsx:170-175 renders 'Binary file (X) -- cannot be displayed' message.
SkillFileBrowser.tsx:195-210 renders RefreshIcon button with onClick calling onRefresh (stopPropagation prevents strip toggle). useSkillFiles.ts:61-63 refresh() re-fetches file list.
api-routes.ts:311-314 resolve(join(skillDir, filePath)) checked with startsWith(resolve(skillDir)). Returns 403 'Access denied'. Fixed during grill (was returning 400).
api-routes.ts:246 registers GET /api/skills/:plugin/:skill/files. Returns { files: [...] } with path, size, type per entry. api.ts:197 getSkillFiles() client method.
api-routes.ts:297 registers GET /api/skills/:plugin/:skill/file?path=. Returns { path, content, size, binary?, truncated? }. api.ts:201 getSkillFile() client method with encodeURIComponent.

findings.title: File >1MB returned 200 with binary:true instead of 413 -- FIXED
findings.issue: AC-US1-09 requires 413 status for files exceeding 1MB. Implementation returned 200 with binary:true flag, which is incorrect per spec.
findings.suggestion: Fixed: changed to sendJson with 413 status and 'File too large' error message.
findings.impact: Frontend would silently show 'binary file' instead of proper error for oversized files.

findings.title: Path traversal returned 400 instead of 403 -- FIXED
findings.issue: AC-US1-13 requires 403 status for path traversal attempts. Implementation returned 400 (bad request) instead of 403 (access denied).
findings.suggestion: Fixed: changed to 403 with 'Access denied' error message.
findings.impact: Incorrect HTTP semantics -- traversal is an authorization failure, not a malformed request.
